---
title: "Learining R3"
author: "Kristina Matthiesen Hansen"
format: html
---

## Pre-Workshop

```{r setup}
#| include: false
```

This code is used for create and uploading my work to GitHub

```{r GitHub}
usethis::use_github()
```

I will work with the nurses-stress.R data

```{r data}
usethis::use_data_raw("nurses-stress")
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(snakecase)
```

# Session-section

Importing new data

Snakecase er den bedste måde at gøre det på - det ser pænere ud

```{r importdata}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886626/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case,
    n_max = 100
  )
```
